videos.title: Stop Aiming High, Do This Instead
videos.summary_source_text:
Stop Aiming High, Do This Instead Why your shot from the blue line should almost never be high.

Every young defenseman grows up believing the answer at the point is to wind up and rip it as hard as possible, ideally somewhere up around the crossbar. The truth is that high shots from the blue line are the easiest pucks a goalie sees all game, and once you understand why, it changes how you think about your role on the offensive zone wall.

When you shoot from up top, the goalie is already squared up, already in his stance, and the moment he reads the release he drops into his butterfly. That butterfly position covers everything from his pads up to roughly his chest, which is exactly the height most defensemen are aiming at when they try to “pick a corner.” You’re firing pucks straight into the part of the net he’s already covering, and even on the rare clean look, his glove and blocker are tracking it the entire way.

Low shots flip the entire equation. A puck coming in around ankle to knee height forces the goalie to actually move and react with his pads, and pucks that hit pads spit out into the slot instead of getting smothered into the chest. That’s where rebounds live, and rebounds are where forwards make their living in the blue paint. Your job up top isn’t to score the highlight goal, it’s to put the puck in a place where chaos can happen in front.

The other piece is traffic. A forward standing at the top of the crease cannot tip a shoulder-high puck, but he can absolutely redirect one that’s coming in around stick-blade height. Same logic applies to screens. Goalies can usually peek over a screen and find a high shot because their eye line is already up there. A low puck weaving through skates, sticks, and shin pads is the one that genuinely disappears on them.

Mechanically, shooting low takes intent. You have to lean into the puck, keep your hands out in front of your body, and finish your follow through with the heel of your blade pointing at the ice rather than up over your shoulder. If your stick is ending up around your ear, your shot is going into the glass.
Keep them low, keep them on net, and let the forwards do their job. The goals come from there. Why your shot from the blue line should almost never be high.

videos.title: Do This in Bed — Feel Your Neck Release in Seconds
videos.summary_source_text:
Do This in Bed — Feel Your Neck Release in Seconds If your neck feels tight, stiff, or restricted, this simple movement done in bed works differently than traditional stretches because it creates a passive rotational release, meaning your head stays relaxed and anchored while your body gently turns, allowing the joints to open and the deeper muscles to lengthen without force, this targets key structures like the sternocleidomastoid muscle along with the smaller cervical rotators that are often missed, and when these tissues become tight or overactive they can contribute to a wide range of symptoms including neck stiffness, reduced mobility, headaches, tension behind the eyes, dizziness, and even ear-related sensations like ringing or pressure, by improving circulation, reducing muscular guarding, and restoring normal motion, this technique may help your neck feel looser and more balanced within seconds, making it especially useful after travel, long periods of sitting, or poor sleep, just move slowly, stay within a comfortable range, and let your body do the work while your head remains relaxed.

Please share this video with your friends and family.  Wishing you and your family many Blessings!  ❤️😊🙏 Dr M

videos.title: Waking Up to Pee at Night? It’s Not Your Bladder!
videos.summary_source_text:
Waking Up to Pee at Night? It’s Not Your Bladder! Do you wake up at night to pee, even just once? You might think it’s your bladder or prostate, but that’s often NOT the real cause.

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

In this video, you’ll discover the hidden reason behind nighttime urination and how you can fix it quickly. It all comes down to a hormone called anti-diuretic hormone (ADH), which controls how much urine your body produces at night.

Many people wake up thinking it’s a bladder issue, but the real solution is often nutritional and hormonal. Small adjustments can make a big difference in nighttime sleep quality.

👉 Get Dr. Berg’s Daily Routine as a free download: https://drbrg.co/4bH08Qv

1/2 cup (100 g) almonds. 1/4 cup (50 g) pecans.
Toast the nuts in a preheated pan for 2 minutes.
Salt.
1 tbsp shredded coconut.
1 tbsp cinnamon.
Blend for 7 minutes.

videos.title: Jared Bednar the Latest Member of the Avalanche to Get Award Snubbed
videos.summary_source_text:
Jared Bednar the Latest Member of the Avalanche to Get Award Snubbed Colorado Avalanche’s Jared Bednar overlooked again for the Jack Adams Award—what will it take for the Avs’ bench boss to finally get his due? With Bednar guiding Colorado to a dominant, wire-to-wire first-place finish, are voters unfairly discounting his impact because of the team’s star talent?

Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson rip into the annual snubbing of Avalanche leaders, from Bednar for Jack Adams to Nathan MacKinnon missing major award recognition. The duo break down why coaches like Lindy Ruff, Dan Muse, and Jon Cooper made the finalist cut, what role injuries and “East Coast bias” play, and the narrative that anyone could win with this Avalanche roster. Can Bednar ever win the Jack Adams in Colorado, or does he need a new team to claim hockey’s top coaching honor?

videos.title: Round 3 Highlights | 2026 Turkish Airlines Open
videos.summary_source_text:
Round 3 Highlights | 2026 Turkish Airlines Open Highlights from round three of the Turkish Airlines Open, where weather played its part on a dramatic moving day.

► SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe 

There's plenty at stake for DP World Tour members as the Asian Swing reaches its climax this week at the Turkish Airlines Open. The eyes of the golfing world turn to Antalya, with Belek's National Golf Club, located within Regnum Hotels, taking on host venue duties for the first time for Türkiye's national open. Players representing 32 countries are set to tee it up, reinforcing the globality of the DP World Tour and the opportunities it provides. No fewer than seven winners so far this season are among the 156-player field, including the returning Jayden Schaper from South Africa, who at third is the highest ranked player in the Race to Dubai standings following his back-to-back wins at the tail end of 2025. While relatively young, the Turkish Airlines Open has played a significant role in the expansion of the DP World Tour’s international footprint. From its inception in 2013, when Tiger Woods made an appearance, the event quickly became a popular stop for players.

Welcome to the Official YouTube channel of the DP World Tour. Every week you can find extended tournament highlights and individual player highlights from the likes of Rory McIlroy, Justin Rose and Tommy Fleetwood. This is also the home of the 14 Club Challenge, Little Interviews, Fastest Hole and many more challenges, pranks and world record attempts featuring the biggest golfers in the world. 

► WEBSITE: http://www.europeantour.com
► FACEBOOK: https://www.facebook.com/DPWorldTour
► TWITTER https://twitter.com/DPWorldTour
► INSTAGRAM https://www.instagram.com/dpworldtour/ Highlights from round three of the Turkish Airlines Open, where weather played its part on a dramatic moving day.

videos.title: Caleb Downs Or Cobie Durant? Who SHOULD Get To Wear No. 2?

videos.title: The hardest path to the PGA TOUR? | Kurt Kitayama: Unscripted
videos.summary_source_text:
The hardest path to the PGA TOUR? | Kurt Kitayama: Unscripted Kurt Kitayama has seen every aspect of professional golf. Turning pro in 2015, Kitayama took his game overseas in hopes of earning a PGA TOUR card. After years of grinding around the globe, Kitayama got his first PGA TOUR victory at the 2023 Arnold Palmer Invitational. He's now ranked 34th in the world. 

PGA TOUR Studios: Unscripted – Kurt Kitayama, presented by Technics, takes you inside the ropes at the RBC Heritage with one of professional golf’s rising stars in his pursuit of perfection. With exclusive access, go behind the scenes as the two‑time PGA TOUR winner prepares for the week, navigates the pressure of competition, and dives into his journey to reach the highest level of the sport.

videos.title: Better Chips Start Here  #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Better Chips Start Here  #golfswing #golftips Your lie plays a huge role in how the ball will come off the club when chipping. What looks good or bad at first glance often changes when you get closer and really assess how the ball is sitting. By taking a few extra seconds to read the lie, you can make better decisions about setup and club selection. That small habit leads to more consistent strike and fewer wasted shots around the green.

videos.title: 85% of Golfers Can't Hit Driver Straight Because Of This Trap
videos.summary_source_text:
85% of Golfers Can't Hit Driver Straight Because Of This Trap If you can't hit driver straight — whether you're slicing it, hooking it or just losing control every time you try to hit it harder — there's a very good chance you're falling into the same trap that catches almost every golfer. Including me. I fell into it on the course just yesterday.

The problem isn't your swing. It's your reaction to your swing. Every time you see the ball curve away from the target, your instinct tells you to aim your body the opposite way to fix it. Slice going right? Aim further left. Hook going left? Swing more to the right. It feels completely logical. But it's actually making the ball curve more — not less. And the harder you try to fix it this way, the worse it gets.
What you need to understand is the relationship between your club face and your swing path. Once you understand this one principle — and this is the golf tip that went viral on social media because it genuinely blows people's minds — you'll finally have the tool to control your ball flight with every single club in the bag. Not just driver. Every club.

⬇️ FREE PRACTICE GUIDE — Everything from this golf lesson in one free download: https://www.dannymaude.com/the-mistake-that-ruins-your-driver-swing

What you'll learn in this golf driver lesson:
▶ Why your instinct to fix a slice or hook is making it worse — not better
▶ The face to path relationship that controls every shot you hit
▶ How to stop slicing your driver by doing the opposite of what feels natural
▶ The exaggeration drill that instantly helps you feel the correct relationship
▶ Why the same principle applies to fixing a golf hook too
▶ How to respond to a bad shot rather than react to it
▶ Why this golf tip works for driver, irons and every club in the bag

⏱️ CHAPTERS
0:00 — The trap that stops 85% of golfers hitting driver straight
1:00 — Why your instinct is making your slice worse
2:00 — The face to path relationship explained
3:35 — Sam's story: the counterintuitive fix that changed everything
4:35 — The exaggeration drill for slicers
5:41 — How the same principle fixes a golf hook
6:21 — How to apply this on the golf course today
8:25 — Why I fell into this trap on the course yesterday
9:32 — Respond don't react — the one rule that changes everything

This golf lesson works for all levels — whether you're a beginner trying to understand why you can't hit driver straight, a mid-handicapper who has been slicing the golf ball for years despite trying every tip going, or an experienced golfer who still occasionally falls into this trap under pressure. If you've ever aimed further left to fix a slice and watched it get worse — this is exactly why. And once you understand the face to path relationship, you'll have a tool for controlling your golf ball flight that no amount of swing tips can give you.

Respond, don't react. That's the principle. And it will change how you play the game.
If this helped your golf swing, hit the like button and subscribe — I release a new golf lesson every single week to help you hit it straighter and play more consistent golf.

📩 Want personalised help with your driver? Head to www.dannymaude.com for lessons and coaching.

#HitDriverStraight #FixGolfSlice #GolfDriverTips

⬇️ FREE PRACTICE GUIDE — Everything from this golf lesson in one free download: https://www.dannymaude.com/the-mistake-that-ruins-your-driver-swing

What you'll learn in this golf driver lesson:
▶ Why your instinct to fix a slice or hook is making it worse — not better
▶ The face to path relationship that controls every shot you hit
▶ How to stop slicing your driver by doing the opposite of what feels natural
▶ The exaggeration drill that instantly helps you feel the correct relationship
▶ Why the same principle applies to fixing a golf hook too
▶ How to respond to a bad shot rather than react to it
▶ Why this golf tip works for driver, irons and every club in the bag

⏱️ CHAPTERS
0:00 — The trap that stops 85% of golfers hitting driver straight
1:00 — Why your instinct is making your slice worse
2:00 — The face to path relationship explained
3:35 — Sam's story: the counterintuitive fix that changed everything
4:35 — The exaggeration drill for slicers
5:41 — How the same principle fixes a golf hook
6:21 — How to apply this on the golf course today
8:25 — Why I fell into this trap on the course yesterday
9:32 — Respond don't react — the one rule that changes everything

This golf lesson works for all levels — whether you're a beginner trying to understand why you can't hit driver straight, a mid-handicapper who has been slicing the golf ball for years despite trying every tip going, or an experienced golfer who still occasionally falls into this trap under pressure. If you've ever aimed further left to fix a slice and watched it get worse — this is exactly why. And once you understand the face to path relationship, you'll have a tool for controlling your golf ball flight that no amount of swing tips can give you.

Respond, don't react. That's the principle. And it will change how you play the game.

Most golfers are obsessed with backswing positions… but the real secret to better ball striking might be what happens after impact. In this lesson, Coach Ed Schwent explains why your follow-through and exit path can instantly fix slices, hooks, fat shots, and inconsistent contact — often without changing anything else in your swing.

You’ll learn the key rule that when the club is parallel to the ground, it should also be parallel to the target line — especially on the follow-through. Ed shows why finishing too high leads to weak, high-right shots, while over-rotating causes hooks, and how to train the correct exit using simple drills like the “catcher’s mitt” drill and through-swing rehearsals.

Finally, you’ll discover why focusing on your finish can actually improve clubface control, swing path, and even clubhead speed. If you’ve struggled to achieve consistent impact positions, this shift in focus could be the breakthrough that transforms your swing and lowers your scores fast.

videos.title: UK | 01st May, Friday - Education Day with Shavez
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 01st May, Friday - Education Day with Shavez 01/05/26

🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 01/05/26

videos.title: How One Simple Behavior Lowers Heart Rate, Blood Pressure, and Inflammation
videos.summary_source_text:
How One Simple Behavior Lowers Heart Rate, Blood Pressure, and Inflammation In this video, I share some of the most surprising research I've come across in my work on inflammation and heart disease. I explain how a simple hug activates hidden nerve fibers (C tactile fibers) in your body that calm the vagus nerve, lower cortisol, and reduce inflammation naturally. Between what I see every day in my practice and what the research shows, human touch is proving to be a powerful form of medicine. I hope this inspires you to hold the people you love a little longer.

Remember that my videos are not a substitute for individualized medical care by a qualified physician. Always consult your physicians before making any diet, nutrition, medication, or lifestyle changes.

videos.summary_source_text:
Rid Throat and Sinus Mucus with SALT Discover how to get rid of mucus in your throat using one ingredient—salt!

Get access to my FREE resources 👉 https://drbrg.co/443w7V8

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

The Best Food for Chronic Sinus Issues (Kimchi Juice / Swab video): 
▶️ https://youtu.be/-A_qqTy4fEw

How to STOP Acid Reflux Instantly
▶️ https://youtu.be/sbU_Pw2AegM

DATA: 
https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/34726628/
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Speleotherapy
https://vitamindwiki.com/Middle+ear+infection+%28Otitis+Media%29+and+Vitamin+D+%E2%80%93+many+studies
https://vitamindwiki.com/Chronic+tonsillitis+virtually+eliminated+in+children+by+Vitamin+D+%2850%2C000+IU+weekly%29+%E2%80%93+RCT+May+2023

0:00 Introduction: How to get rid of mucus using salt
0:54 What does salt do to microbes? 
3:35 How to use salt to get rid of mucus 
6:20 The best natural options for sinus mucus
11:26 Discover how to use salt to get rid of respiratory mucus

Today, we’re going to take a look at how salt can effectively get rid of bacteria, fungi, yeast, and mold in the body. Salt causes water to move out of the cell, eliminating these pathogens through dehydration.

Salt thins mucus with this same mechanism. Salt removes water from the mucus, making it thinner so that it can be more easily expelled from the body.

To eliminate mucus using salt, dissolve a teaspoon of sea salt (not table salt) in a glass of water. Drink or gargle the salt water. This exposes the mouth and throat to salt, which helps to get rid of mucus, improves immunity, and strengthens the autonomic nervous system. 

You can also use diluted apple cider vinegar. This changes the pH and helps kill microbes.  

A Neti pot uses nasal irrigation to gently send a stream of diluted salt water through your sinuses, helping to thin the mucus. If you have a constant post-nasal drip, you may have a fungal infection or mold issue going on in your sinuses, and cutting sugar from your diet may help.

You can also use a humidifier with a saltwater solution while you sleep. A humidifier turns liquid into vapor, allowing you to inhale the salt water. Halotherapy, or salt therapy, can also be beneficial. 

If none of these remedies seem to be working, an ear infection could be the source of your mucus. In this case, try putting four to five drops of saltwater directly into each ear. You can try the same thing with diluted apple cider vinegar or use one drop of garlic oil in each ear.

Vitamin D supports your immune system and helps prevent mucus. Vitamin D deficiencies are associated with enlarged tonsils, sinus allergies, sinus mucus, and ear infections. Try taking 20,000 to 50,000 IU of vitamin D once per week to address mucus.

videos.title: Ferrari Purosangue v BMW X5 M v China’s CRAZIEST SUV: DRAG RACE
videos.summary_source_text:
Ferrari Purosangue v BMW X5 M v China’s CRAZIEST SUV: DRAG RACE Thanks to everyone who lent us their cars for this race: 
- Zeekr 8X: https://www.instagram.com/kainiansgarage/ 
- Ferrari Purosangue: https://www.instagram.com/kuickcars/ 
- BMW X5M: https://www.instagram.com/motortimegroup/ 
- Land Rover Defender OCTA: https://www.instagram.com/thecarfilmingsafetyguy/

Explore new & used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-0205

It’s time for a global SUV showdown! 

We’ve got our hands on the British Land Rover Defender OCTA, the German BMW X5M Competition, the Italian Ferrari Purosangue, and the Chinese Zeekr 8X Yaoying! 

You may not have heard of the Zeekr, but we think it could easily be a good match for the other cars in this line-up! So let’s check out the stats… 

The Ferrari is powered by a 6.5-litre naturally-aspirated V12 that pumps out 725hp and 716Nm. Power is sent to all four wheels via an 8-speed auto gearbox, and it weighs in at 2,033kg. It’s easily the most expensive car here, with the starting price coming in at £313,000. 

Then we have the BMW. There’s a 4.4-litre twin-turbo V8 under the bonnet, and this puts down 625hp and 750Nm. Power is sent to all four wheels via an 8-speed torque converter, and it tips the scales at 2,400kg. It’s a whole lot cheaper than the Ferrari, costing £137,330.

In Britain’s corner, we have the Defender OCTA. You’ll find the same BMW engine under the bonnet as in the X5M, but here it produces 635hp and 800Nm. It has the same gearbox, it weighs in at 2,510kg, and it costs just under £150,000. 

Then, finally, we have the Zeekr. Under the bonnet, it only has a 2-litre turbo 4-cylinder, but it has a secret up its sleeve - 3 electric motors! When they all work in tandem, it puts down a colossal 1,400hp and 1,410Nm! However, it’s easily the heaviest here, at 2,820kg, but it’s incredibly cheap - it only costs around £54,000!!

So will this all-new Chinese EV walk it? There’s only one way to find out for sure - LET’S RACE!

BMW v Porsche v AMG: https://bit.ly/Carwow-Drag-0205 Thanks to everyone who lent us their cars for this race: 
- Zeekr 8X: https://www.instagram.com/kainiansgarage/ 
- Ferrari Purosangue: https://www.instagram.com/kuickcars/ 
- BMW X5M: https://www.instagram.com/motortimegroup/ 
- Land Rover Defender OCTA: https://www.instagram.com/thecarfilmingsafetyguy/

The Texas Rangers have the best bullpen ERA in the American League and second-best in the majors, despite not having a traditional closer. It’s been a closer-by-committee plan so far, but the Rangers might have stumbled upon a pitcher who settles into the role. It’s Jacob Latz, who recorded the final six outs Wednesday in a 3-0 victory over the Yankees. Latz was competing to be in the starting rotation in spring training, but has arguably been the Rangers’ best reliever this season. A few other good things happened Wednesday as the Rangers snapped a three-game losing streak, but there is one issue still hanging over the team and change could be coming.

videos.title: En enkel övning för längre och bättre drives…
videos.channel: Bättre & Enklare golf med Marcus Edblad PGA
videos.summary_source_text:
En enkel övning för längre och bättre drives… Denna övning med en Pw hjälper dig förstå och utföra en perfekt driver sving. Lär dig slå upp på bollen och slå minst 30 meter längre. #golfswing #golf #golflife 

Nu finns det möjlighet att genom appen Skillest göra mig till din personliga tränare. Du hittar mig på denna länk: https://skillest.com/app/profile/marcus-edblad

Låt mig hjälpa dig finna bättre slag, bollträff, riktning och svinghastighet. Oavsett om du slår en wedge, järnklubba eller driver kan du med dina händer lära dig golfslag som du inte trodde var möjliga. Längre och rakare slag kräver alltid träning men något alla kan lära sig.  

Vare sig du fightas med en slice eller en hook så har jag videos som kan guida till bättre golf. Är du nybörjare så kan du börja med min grönt kort eller nybörjarkurs.

Försök ersätta dåliga vanor med nya bättre vanor. Oavsett vilket loft eller skaft din klubba har så är det du som bestämmer vad som ska hända. Oavsett om det står callaway, ping, titleist eller taylor made på klubban så kan du slå bra slag.

Var noga med vad du tittar på. Det finns många duktiga instruktörer på nätet, några av mina favoriter är Mike Malaska, Mike Dunaway, Mike Austin.

Försök fokusera på grunderna i slaget bollträff, bladkontroll och svingspår. Träna med fördel på en sak i taget. Tränar du din svinghastighet måste du tillåta att det går snett och tränar du raka slag kan du inte samtidigt svinga i max fart.

Ha tålamod och låt det ta sin tid, luras inte av genvägar som bara gör att du tappar fokus från det viktiga. Golf kommer alltid vara svårt men vi kan med träning se till att vi blir bättre för varje dag som går.

Titta mycket på golf på TV. Bryson Dechambeu, Dustin Johnson, Rory Mcilroy kan inspirera till längre slag och andra som Tiger Woods, Viktor Hovland, Ludvig Åberg och Phil Mickelson kan ge dig fantasi att skapa nya slag.

Träna styrketräning för hela kroppen för att må bra genom livet och skapa en effektiv maskin. Träna händer, handleder och armar för att skapa en effektiv release och mer svinghastighet.

Du kan finna inspiration i filmer som Happy Gilmore, Tin Cup eller Bagger Vance. Filmer som Rocky kan ge dig motivation att ta dig till gymet. Legender som Arnold Schwarzenegger, Sylvester Stallone eller Hulk Hogan kan få dig att vilja bli starkare och Moe Norman, Arnold Palmer, Ben Hogan, Sam Snead eller Jack Nicklaus kan inspirera dig att bli en bättre golfare. 

Ge aldrig upp i sökandet och träningen för att få bästa bollträff, bladkontroll och svingspår.

Filmat med iPhone 17 och redigerat i iMovie på en Macbook. Denna övning med en Pw hjälper dig förstå och utföra en perfekt driver sving. Lär dig slå upp på bollen och slå minst 30 meter längre. #golfswing #golf #golflife

videos.title: Den hemliga norska vapensmugglingen i Göteborg
videos.summary_source_text:
Den hemliga norska vapensmugglingen i Göteborg 00:00-00:40  Intro
00:40-02:35 Ubåten Ulven
02:35-04:14 Minspärren i Skagerrak 
04:14-06:17 Kullager och ”Operation Rubble”
06:17-07:15 Kvarstadsbåtarna
07:15-10:20 ”Operation Performance”
10:20-12:04 Vapensmuggling i Göteborg
12:04-12:49 ”Operation Bridford”
12:49-14:38 Hamnspärren 1944
14:38-15:40 Krigsseglarmonumentet


KULLAGER OCH KRIGET - De norska kvarstadsbåtarna i Göteborg
I samband med anfallet mot Norge i april 1940 lade Nazityskland ut en bevakad minspärr i Skagerrak. Handelsfartygen i Sverige blev därmed inlåsta bakom spärren och svenska fartyg ute på världshaven kunde inte ta sig hem. 
I svenska hamnar låg också norska fartyg, som både Nazityskland och den norska exilregeringen gjorde anspråk på. Fem norska fartyg gjorde en utbrytning 1941 i skydd av januarimörket - "Operation Rubble". Svenska kullager och viktiga verkstadsprodukter kunde därmed nå Storbritannien.
De kvarvarande norska fartygen i Sverige beordrades till Göteborg och den svenska regeringen lät tiden gå genom en långsam juridisk process. Under tiden lastades fartygen med kullager, specialstål - och vapen. Tio fartyg försökte sig på en ny utbrytning 1942.
Filmen handlar om en ödesmättad tid, då neutrala Sverige försökte hantera alla krigförande parters önskemål, utan att själv bli indraget i kriget. I vågskålen låg Sveriges försörjning; den  livsviktiga lejdtrafiken krävde godkännande från såväl Storbritannien och Nazityskland. 
Tusentals norska och svenska sjömän dog under andra världskriget, i den civila sjöfartens tjänst.

videos.title: PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 2 | Cadillac Championship | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 2 | Cadillac Championship | 2026 Check out all the best shots from Round 2 of the 2026 Cadillac Championship, featuring Justin Thomas, Scottie Scheffler, Jordan Spieth and Cameron Young, among others.

The PGA TOUR heads back to the iconic Trump National Doral for the Cadillac Championship, marking the return of the famed “Blue Monster” for the first time since 2016. As the first of back-to-back Signature Events leading into the season’s second major, the field is stacked, led by world No. 1 Scottie Scheffler, who arrives in strong form after a playoff loss at the RBC Heritage and consecutive runner-up finishes. There’s plenty of firepower behind him. Collin Morikawa continues a red-hot run of results, while Cameron Young brings elite form highlighted by a win at THE PLAYERS Championship. Meanwhile, Chris Gotterup remains one of the standout performers of 2026 with multiple victories already this season. A major storyline comes from Alex Fitzpatrick, who earned entry into this Signature Event run after teaming with brother Matt Fitzpatrick to win the Zurich Classic of New Orleans. Past success at Doral also returns to the spotlight, with Adam Scott, the 2016 winner back on the Blue Monster, joined by former champion Justin Rose. With FedExCup points, Signature Event status and major momentum all on the line, the Blue Monster once again presents one of the TOUR’s toughest and most iconic tests.

Elon Musk is suing OpenAI and Sam Altman, claiming they abandoned their founding mission to "benefit humanity" in favor of chasing profits. OpenAI is saying that Elon is just mad and trying to boost his own AI competitor, Grok.

videos.title: Most Players Make This Mistake Their Entire Career
videos.summary_source_text:
Most Players Make This Mistake Their Entire Career The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: Have you tried the Epsom salt test???🧂#golftips #golfballs
videos.summary_source_text:
Have you tried the Epsom salt test???🧂#golftips #golfballs Look, we get it.
Bryson said he had success.
It’s cheap. Easy. Feels like a hack.

But honestly… we don’t want you wasting your time or money.

Bryson DeChambeau has talked about using Epsom salt testing before—even saying it helped him choose the Bridgestone TOUR B as the most consistent ball.

Now? He’s gaming a Titleist Pro V1x Left Dash.

So yeah… there might be a little more going on than just a salt test.

We break down the whole thing and whether it’s actually worth doing.

Before you start floating golf balls in your kitchen… watch this. Look, we get it.

videos.title: Look at Your Eyes Right Now — This Could Be a Liver Warning
videos.summary_source_text:
Look at Your Eyes Right Now — This Could Be a Liver Warning How your eyes can tell you if your liver is healthy may surprise you, because subtle changes like yellowing of the whites, small cholesterol deposits around the eyelids, persistent redness, or even dryness can be early signs that your liver is under stress. The liver plays a critical role in filtering toxins, balancing blood sugar, metabolizing fats, and supporting digestion, but when it becomes overwhelmed from excess sugar, poor diet, alcohol, or inflammation, these warning signs can begin to show up in places most people never think to look. Conditions like fatty liver disease, elevated triglycerides, and toxin buildup often develop silently, making it important to recognize these clues early before more serious problems arise. The good news is that the liver has an incredible ability to heal and regenerate when you give it the right support through proper nutrition, hydration, and healthy lifestyle choices. Pay attention to your body, because your eyes may be telling you more about your health than you realize.

Google Gemini 4 Explained: 10 Trillion Parameters & 1M Context Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Google Gemini 4 is coming — and it's not just another chatbot upgrade. 
It's Google's biggest bet on agentic AI: a model that doesn't just answer 
your questions, but actually books your flights, manages your calendar, 
and runs multi-step tasks on its own.

In this video, I break down everything we actually know about Gemini 4 — 
the release date predictions, expected features, how it stacks up against 
GPT-5.5 and Claude Opus 4.7, and why it could change the way you work, 
code, and shop online.

No hype. No fluff. Just the real picture based on Google's own blogs, 
the Gemini 3 roadmap, and what the smartest analysts are predicting.

videos.title: Perfect Popcorn (5 years refined)🍿
videos.summary_source_text:
Perfect Popcorn (5 years refined)🍿 Mike G’s “Cheezy” Popcorn Seasoning

Ingredients:
-1 cup nutritional yeast
-1/4 cup kosher salt
-1 tablespoon garlic powder
-1 tablespoon onion powder
-1 tablespoon paprika

Instructions:
Add all ingredients to a spice grinder or blender and blend until the mixture becomes a fine powder. A finer texture will coat the popcorn more evenly and give you the best flavor in every bite.
Store in an airtight container for up to several months. Mike G’s “Cheezy” Popcorn Seasoning

Store in an airtight container for up to several months.

videos.title: Round 2 Highlights | 2026 Turkish Airlines Open
videos.summary_source_text:
Round 2 Highlights | 2026 Turkish Airlines Open Watch highlights from the second round of the Turkish Airlines Open.

► SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe 

There's plenty at stake for DP World Tour members as the Asian Swing reaches its climax this week at the Turkish Airlines Open. The eyes of the golfing world turn to Antalya, with Belek's National Golf Club, located within Regnum Hotels, taking on host venue duties for the first time for Türkiye's national open. Players representing 32 countries are set to tee it up, reinforcing the globality of the DP World Tour and the opportunities it provides. No fewer than seven winners so far this season are among the 156-player field, including the returning Jayden Schaper from South Africa, who at third is the highest ranked player in the Race to Dubai standings following his back-to-back wins at the tail end of 2025. While relatively young, the Turkish Airlines Open has played a significant role in the expansion of the DP World Tour’s international footprint. From its inception in 2013, when Tiger Woods made an appearance, the event quickly became a popular stop for players.

Welcome to the Official YouTube channel of the DP World Tour. Every week you can find extended tournament highlights and individual player highlights from the likes of Rory McIlroy, Justin Rose and Tommy Fleetwood. This is also the home of the 14 Club Challenge, Little Interviews, Fastest Hole and many more challenges, pranks and world record attempts featuring the biggest golfers in the world. 

► WEBSITE: http://www.europeantour.com
► FACEBOOK: https://www.facebook.com/DPWorldTour
► TWITTER https://twitter.com/DPWorldTour
► INSTAGRAM https://www.instagram.com/dpworldtour/ Watch highlights from the second round of the Turkish Airlines Open.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

videos.title: What Happens If You Drink Lemon Water Every Morning? (14-Day Results)
videos.summary_source_text:
What Happens If You Drink Lemon Water Every Morning? (14-Day Results) What would happen if you drank a glass of water every morning for 14 days?

Most people wake up dehydrated after 7–8 hours of sleep… and the very first thing they reach for is coffee. But what if you started your day differently?

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

👉 Get Dr. Berg’s Daily Routine as a free download: https://drbrg.co/41LCb4m

In this video, we break down what really happens when you drink a glass of water first thing in the morning, especially when you add fresh lemon.

Lemon water is more than just refreshing. It contains natural electrolytes that help hydrate your body more effectively, vitamin C that supports collagen and healthy skin, and citrates that may help reduce the risk of kidney stones.

Try this simple habit for 14 days and see how your body responds.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:

Flyers in a Category 5 Hurricanes ft. Cory Lavalette As we wait for the Round 2 schedule between the Carolina Hurricanes and the Philadelphia Flyers, let's discuss all things surrounding both teams. From the regular season to the playoffs and more. This time, we have a special guest. On the Friday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach is joined by The Athletic & North State Journal's Cory Lavalette as both guys give their thoughts on the Hurricanes' playoffs so far. What did Cory see in Round 1 that gives him a sense of how this playoff run is different for the Hurricanes? Secondly, after seeing some of the Flyers and Pittsburgh Penguins series, what does Cory think the Flyers will bring to the first-ever playoff matchup between the two sides? What are some early takeaways or things he will be looking for in the series? Finally, the guys conclude the show by giving their thoughts on what they hope to see in the Round 2 series from the Hurricanes. Is it special teams? Is it certain lines? videos.title: UK | 30th April, Thursday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 30th April, Thursday - RIFT Presentation 30/04/26

🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 30/04/26

videos.title: Clean Contact Starts With Ball Placement  #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Clean Contact Starts With Ball Placement  #golfswing #golftips If the ball sits too far back in your stance, you’re almost guaranteed to release early, lose your weight shift, and bottom out the club too soon—often leading to fat or duffed shots. Moving the ball slightly forward creates a much better environment for proper sequencing. It encourages a cleaner shift toward the target, helps you retain lag, and allows the club to bottom out after the ball like it should. Even a small adjustment in ball position can dramatically improve your strike.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. videos.title: Codex Desktop Is Wild (Full Mac Takeover)
videos.summary_source_text:
Codex Desktop Is Wild (Full Mac Takeover) 🌴 I'm in LA and holding a Creator Magic meetup 👉 https://mrc.fm/lameet

In this video I put OpenAI Codex Desktop to the test by letting it take full control of my Mac using GPT-5.5 with computer use. I gave it three creative challenges: clean up an audio recording in Adobe Audition like a pro engineer, design a YouTube thumbnail concept in Photoshop, and generate an AI video in Adobe Firefly. All hands-free while I worked on other things. The results were genuinely surprising (and a little wild). If you've been curious about where AI agents and computer use are heading for content creators, this one's for you. Let me know in the comments what you'd automate on your Mac!

videos.title: The Key To Shin Angle (10&2 Edition)
videos.summary_source_text:
The Key To Shin Angle (10&2 Edition) The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

#train2point0 #downhillskating #hockeytraining #NHL The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: This Mobility Test Explains Your Swing  #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
This Mobility Test Explains Your Swing  #golfswing #golftips This simple 90/90 mobility test gives you a clear look at how your right arm should function in the golf swing. From a 5-iron posture, lift and rotate the arm until it matches your spine angle—if you can’t get there, your backswing is likely compensating by standing up or losing posture. That compensation often leads to poor ball striking and inconsistent contact. Your swing should reflect what your body can actually do, even if that means a shorter backswing.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. This simple 90/90 mobility test gives you a clear look at how your right arm should function in the golf swing. videos.title: Round 1 Highlights | 2026 Turkish Airlines Open
videos.summary_source_text:
Round 1 Highlights | 2026 Turkish Airlines Open Highlights from the opening round at the 2026 Turkish Airlines Open.

► SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe 

There's plenty at stake for DP World Tour members as the Asian Swing reaches its climax this week at the Turkish Airlines Open. The eyes of the golfing world turn to Antalya, with Belek's National Golf Club, located within Regnum Hotels, taking on host venue duties for the first time for Türkiye's national open. Players representing 32 countries are set to tee it up, reinforcing the globality of the DP World Tour and the opportunities it provides. From its inception in 2013, when Tiger Woods made an appearance, the event quickly became a popular stop for players.

videos.title: Why You’re Losing Compression with Your Irons - It Starts in the Backswing
videos.summary_source_text:
Why You’re Losing Compression with Your Irons - It Starts in the Backswing ⛳️ Take Your FREE Game Assessment → https://meandmygolf.com/game-plan/?utm_source=YouTube&utm_medium=Description&utm_campaign=30.04.26

Why are you losing compression with your irons, even when your downswing feels good?
In this video, we break down one of the most common backswing mistakes that leads to early release, poor contact, and inconsistent iron shots. If you struggle with thin strikes, heavy shots, or a lack of distance and control, this could be the reason why.
You’ll learn how getting too narrow in the backswing affects your downswing sequence, why it causes you to lose shaft lean, and how a simple adjustment can help you strike the ball more cleanly and consistently.
If you want better compression, more control, and more predictable iron shots, this is a must-watch.

videos.title: Macrohard Explained: Elon Musk's New AI Project That Could Replace Entire Companies (2026)
videos.summary_source_text:
Macrohard Explained: Elon Musk's New AI Project That Could Replace Entire Companies (2026) Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Elon Musk just announced Macrohard, a joint xAI–Tesla project that pairs Grok with a Tesla-built AI agent capable of controlling your entire computer. After digging through Reuters, Wired, TechCrunch, and xAI's own announcements, I found something most coverage is missing — and it's not what everyone's talking about.

In this video, I break down exactly what Macrohard is, how Grok has evolved in 2026, real use cases, the privacy concerns nobody's warning you about, pricing, and how it stacks up against ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude.

⏱️ TIMESTAMPS
00:00 Intro – Why this Musk announcement might actually matter
01:17 What Is Macrohard?
04:01 What Is Grok?
06:26 Capabilities and Features
08:23 Real-World Use Cases
10:37 Limitations and Concerns
12:31 Privacy and Security
14:10 Pricing and Access
15:30 Availability Timeline
16:33 Macrohard vs the Competition

🔑 KEY TAKEAWAYS
- Macrohard pairs xAI's Grok (the brain) with a Tesla agent that watches your screen and controls your keyboard/mouse
- Runs on Tesla's custom AI4 chips + Nvidia hardware
- Grok 4.1 now has a 2 million token context window and a SuperGrok Heavy tier (~$300/month)
- Privacy alert: X posts and Grok chats are used for training BY DEFAULT unless you opt out
- Macrohard isn't publicly available yet — beta likely late 2026, public release possibly mid-2027

📚 SOURCES
All information in this video is sourced from official xAI announcements, Elon Musk's posts on X, Reuters, Wired, and TechCrunch reporting.

💬 What do YOU think — is Macrohard going to deliver, or is this another Musk overpromise? Drop your thoughts in the comments.

👍 If this breakdown helped, hit LIKE and SUBSCRIBE for deep dives on every major AI launch.

videos.title: The ONLY Forearm Exercise You Need…
videos.summary_source_text:
The ONLY Forearm Exercise You Need… If your forearms aren’t growing, this is probably the missing piece you haven’t been using.
Most people stick to wrist curls and extensions with dumbbells or a barbell. They can work—but if your progress has stalled, it’s time to switch the stimulus and challenge your forearms in a completely different way.
All you need is a resistance band, a barbell set in a rack, and a dumbbell or kettlebell. Loop the band around the handle of the weight on the floor, then secure the other end by wrapping it around the sleeve of the barbell a couple of times so it won’t slip.
From there, grab the end of the barbell and begin rolling it forward with your palms facing down. As you twist the bar, the band tightens and lifts the weight off the ground. Keep rolling until the weight reaches the top or your forearms give out—whichever hits first.
This variation lights up the forearm flexors and builds thickness on the underside of your forearms.
To target the top side, simply reverse the motion and roll the bar toward you instead. Same setup, different emphasis.
You can train both sides in the same session—2–3 sets each direction—and cover more ground than standard wrist curls ever will.
If you’ve never used this before, add it in and see how quickly your forearms respond. Sometimes it’s not about doing more—it’s about doing something different.
For more tips on how to build muscle and get big forearms, be sure to stay tuned to this channel and remember to subscribe so that you never miss another video from a physical therapist with a pro sports background as a PT and strength coach.

You can subscribe to this channel here - http://bit.ly/2b0coMW

👉 https://www.instagram.com/athleanx 

For complete step-by-step workout programs, head on over to athleanx.com and make sure to use the program selector to find the training plan that is best suited to your personal goals.

Jeff Cavaliere MSPT, CSCS served as both the head physical therapist and assistant strength coach for the New York Mets. Jeff earned his Masters of Physical Therapy and Bachelor’s of Physioneurobiology from the College of Health Sciences University of Connecticut Storrs. He is a certified Strength and Conditioning Specialist by the National Strength and Conditioning Association (NSCA). videos.title: If I Could Teach Golfers ONE Thing… It Would Be This
videos.summary_source_text:
If I Could Teach Golfers ONE Thing… It Would Be This Most golfers spend years chasing a better strike… but never actually learn what creates it.

In this video, I break down the ONE move I’d teach every golfer if I had to choose just one. This is the foundation for solid iron strikes and a more consistent driver — and it’s something almost every player I coach is missing at first.

You’ll learn:

What really controls strike and compression
The key move that changes your impact instantly
A simple drill to start improving straight away
How to transfer it from irons to driver

If you’ve ever struggled with thin, heavy, or inconsistent shots, this will give you a completely different way to think about your swing — and a clear plan to fix it.

Train it properly, and you’ll start to feel that clean, powerful strike every golfer is chasing.

videos.title: Kids are stickhandling with the wrong hand
videos.summary_source_text:
Kids are stickhandling with the wrong hand Without wrist strength kids can’t stickhandle properly. The earlier we develop top hand strength, the better their stickhandling will become. 

Back in the olden days, we used wrist curls to develop strength but simply stickhandling with your top hand only does a better job for stickhandling as it works the wrist in all different angles and you get the endurance benefits as well.

videos.title: Kvinnor får sämre finansiell rådgivning än män
videos.summary_source_text:
Kvinnor får sämre finansiell rådgivning än män En ny studie – Gender Differences in Financial Advice – analyserar över 27 000 verkliga bankmöten och visar något som är både obekvämt och viktigt:

Två personer med samma ekonomi, risknivå och mål kan få olika råd – beroende på kön.

Kvinnor får i genomsnitt:
– 5,7–6,6 % lägre sannolikhet att få rabatt
– 3,9–8,8 % högre sannolikhet att rekommenderas dyrare bankfonder
– högre avgifter även inom samma fondkategori

Vad betyder det i praktiken?

👉 Cirka 40.000 kr lägre slutkapital på 20 år
(per 100 000 investerade)

Förklaringen handlar inte främst om illvilja, utan om två saker:

1. Hur rådgivare bedömer kunders kunskap
2. Bankernas incitament att sälja mer lönsamma produkter

Det här är ett klassiskt agent–principal-problem – där rådgivningen inte alltid ligger i ditt bästa intresse.

Men det finns också en viktig takeaway:

Att förstå grunderna i sparande är ett skydd.

I videon pratar vi om vad du konkret kan göra:
– fråga vad rådgivaren tjänar
– jämför alltid med billiga indexalternativ
– överväg fondrobot eller passivt sparande

🙏 Tack till dig som supporter som gör den här typen av genomgångar möjliga.

videos.summary_source_text:
This AI Actually Surprised Me ChatGPT’s new image model did something that blew me away 🤯

Usually, you'd have to download images from the source and drop them into ChatGPT with your prompt so the AI can use them in the output. 

But this new model was able to just grab them from the site using only the URL.

Making flyers, ads, menus, promos, product images, etc. just got A LOT easier, and with a lot less worry that the AI is going to grab random hallucinated images or details from all over the place. 

Have you tried ChatGPT Images 2.0 yet? And did it impress you, or not so much?

videos.summary_source_text:
The Next 3 Most Dangerous Carbs in the World These dangerous carbohydrates are often marketed as healthy, but they’re actually some of the worst carbs for your body. Discover how these "healthy" carbs spike your blood sugar and wreck your health. 

0:00 Introduction: The worst carbs in the world
0:27 Agave syrup and the glycemic index
3:12 More carbs that destroy your health 
3:34 The problem with high-fructose foods 
5:10 Stop eating these carbs

▶️ https://youtu.be/njtpfIvji1c
▶️ https://youtu.be/O6ftQwEeMHY

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

👉 Download Dr. Berg’s Free Daily Health Routine: https://drbrg.co/4tHGsCi

I’ve already covered the most dangerous carbohydrate in the world. Here are 3 more carbs to avoid!

Agave nectar is often marketed as a healthy sweetener, similar to honey, but it’s made up of 80–90% fructose. Fructose is processed only by the liver, where it can create stress and is handled similarly to alcohol. Research has shown that agave syrup can significantly raise triglyceride levels.

Agave syrup is highly processed, with the final product containing more calories than table sugar!

High-fructose foods like agave syrup and fruit juice can contain more fructose than soda. Excess fructose intake is linked to liver damage, metabolic dysfunction, and changes in brain genes.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

• Full 18-hole course vlogs

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

• Amazing golf courses

• Worldwide golf adventures

videos.title: READING THE FLYERS! The Carolina Hurricanes Will Face the Philadelphia Flyers in Round 2!
videos.summary_source_text:
READING THE FLYERS! The Carolina Hurricanes Will Face the Philadelphia Flyers in Round 2! After waiting a few extra days, we finally know the opponent for the Carolina Hurricanes. The Philadelphia Flyers defeated the Pittsburgh Penguins 1-0 in Game 6 to win their series 4-2. For the first time, the Hurricanes will take on the Flyers in the postseason. What can we see from the regular season as we do a light review on it before the Round 2 crossover with Locked On Flyers? On the Thursday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach starts the show by sharing his thoughts on how it's the first Stanley Cup Playoff meeting between the Hurricanes and Flyers. Furthermore, how did the four games in the regular season go down between both sides? Is there anything to take from those games ahead of their Round 2 showdown? Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on how the Hurricanes and the Flyers did in their first-round matchups. What can Zach see between both sides ahead of the Round 2 crossover show with Locked On Flyers? Finally, Zach shares his thoughts on which players on both teams he is looking at early before Round 2 begins. All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: Is the NEW Land Cruiser totally OVERRATED?
videos.summary_source_text:
Is the NEW Land Cruiser totally OVERRATED? Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-3004

Thanks to https://www.instagram.com/tru7group/ for lending us their Hilux!

It’s time for a Toyota-on-Toyota off-road showdown!

We’ve got the legendary Toyota Hilux going head-to-head with the all-new Toyota Land Cruiser. On paper, they’re practically twins: both are powered by a 2.8-litre 4-cylinder turbo diesel with 204hp and 500Nm of torque.

But as we know, paper specs don’t win off-road battles!

The Hilux is one of the world’s most indestructible pick-ups, featuring a leaf-sprung rear end and a rugged, no-nonsense approach to getting over rocks. However, it’s facing off against the brand-new Land Cruiser - a tech-heavy beast packed with off-roading features, better articulation, and a much shorter wheelbase.

Will the Hilux’s simplicity and clearance be enough to take down its posh SUV sibling? Or will the Land Cruiser’s modern off-road smarts make Mat look like a hero? There’s only one way to find out, and it'll include a radical hill-descent-control test Mat's NEVER done before! LET’S DO THIS! videos.title: Bilarna är överlägsna, men hälften kommer gå i konkurs – Rapport från Peking
videos.summary_source_text:
Bilarna är överlägsna, men hälften kommer gå i konkurs – Rapport från Peking Välkommen till en rapport från Beijing Auto Show – världens största bilmässa. Här möts vi av en paradox som saknar motstycke: bilarna som visas upp är tekniskt överlägsna, har fantastisk kvalitet och prislappar som får västvärldens tillverkare att darra. Samtidigt blöder den kinesiska industrin.

Jag djupdyker i det brutala priskriget som nu skördar sina offer. Vi pratar om hundratusentals uppsagda, halverade löner för toppchefer och en enorm överkapacitet på 20 miljoner bilar som marknaden inte kan svälja. Hur kan bilar som Xiaomi SU7 och Zeekr 8X vara så bra när marginalerna pressas ner mot 1 %?

Vi går igenom allt från flygande passagerardrönare och robot-taxis till nästa generations solid state-batterier. Är den kinesiska bilboomen en fantastisk teknisk revolution eller en ekonomisk bubbla som snart spricker?

videos.title: UK | 29th April, Wednesday - Weekly Updates
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 29th April, Wednesday - Weekly Updates 29/04/26

🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 29/04/26

videos.title: Scott Wedgewood, Not A Vezina Finalist, Is the Latest Avs Player to Get Snubbed For a League Award
videos.summary_source_text:
Scott Wedgewood, Not A Vezina Finalist, Is the Latest Avs Player to Get Snubbed For a League Award Colorado Avalanche fans voice outrage as Scott Wedgewood is snubbed for the Vezina Trophy despite league-leading numbers. Should elite team defense penalize goalies, or is the NHL media simply favoring familiar names? Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson offer a fiery breakdown of Wedgewood’s historic season, the merits of his overlooked stats, and question if the Avalanche’s overall strength is hurting individual award chances for stars like Nathan MacKinnon and Cale Makar.

The conversation shifts to NHL playoff intensity as Jamie Benn escapes suspension for a blatant cross-check, sparking debate on league discipline and double standards after past suspensions for Nazem Kadri and Makar. Plus, The Hockey News Top 100 players list is revealed—find out which Avalanche stars moved up, slid down, or got their due at last. Can Colorado’s standouts break through media biases and claim their hardware, or will the snubs keep coming?

videos.title: Amazing Drill to Square Your Clubface #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Amazing Drill to Square Your Clubface #golfswing #golftips Weak iron shots often start with the clubface opening too much in the backswing. When the face points skyward early and stays open at the top, golfers are forced to add loft and compensate through impact. Improving face control earlier in the swing helps strengthen loft, compress the ball, and produce straighter, more powerful shots.
If clubface control or weak iron strikes are something you’re working on, head to the link in our bio. Our coaching plans help you square the face earlier and build compression that holds up under pressure — without guessing.

videos.title: How to Get More Power and Rotation on Your Shot
videos.summary_source_text:
How to Get More Power and Rotation on Your Shot The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: Rick Shiels Reviews McLaren Golf Clubs (FIRST LOOK!)
videos.summary_source_text:
Rick Shiels Reviews McLaren Golf Clubs (FIRST LOOK!) Rick Shiels gets an exclusive first look at the new McLaren Golf Series 3 irons - bringing McLaren’s performance-driven approach from Formula 1 into golf equipment.

With McLaren Racing stars like Lando Norris representing the brand globally, and CEO Zak Brown continuing to expand McLaren beyond motorsport, the Series 3 irons are another bold step for the company. Designed with input from major champion Justin Rose, these irons combine premium looks with serious on-course performance.

In this video, Rick tests the McLaren Series 3 irons to see if they deliver more than just the badge. From feel and forgiveness to distance and consistency, this is a full honest review of one of the most talked-about iron releases in golf.

Are McLaren genuinely changing the golf equipment game, or is this all about the name?

Let us know what you think in the comments.

Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

I Tried the ‘Impossible to Slice’ Driver and Wasn’t Expecting THIS New contender in the world of golf equipment that promises more distance, more forgiveness, and better control off the tee...with a combination using an anti-slice tee. With an anti slice driver and an anti-slice tee, how can this possibly work!? Is this even legal?

We’ll test its performance on the course and launch monitor to see how it really stacks up against today’s leading models from TaylorMade, Callaway, and Titleist.

Subscribe to this channel for more honest, none bias reviews ‪‪‪‪‪@AlexElliottReviews

3 Different Shots to Play From the Bunker #golfswing #golftips Most golfers can get the ball out of the bunker — but not with the control they want.
This video shows you three bunker shot levels: get it out, get it controlled, and get it spinning.
It all comes down to your entry point — where the club first enters the sand.
Start experimenting with how close to the ball you strike the sand to control spin, rollout, and stopping power.

Stop Eating Yogurt for Gut Health (Here’s Why) Wait… yogurt might actually be making your candida worse?

Most people turn to yogurt to “fix” their gut and add more friendly bacteria. But here’s the problem…

👉 Get Dr. Berg’s Daily Routine as a free download: https://drbrg.co/4cwthfR

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

Your stomach is extremely acidic, almost like battery acid, and most of the bacteria in yogurt don’t survive long enough to reach your gut. On top of that, yogurt typically contains only a few strains of bacteria, often in relatively small amounts.

And it gets worse… many store-bought yogurts are loaded with sugar, which can actually feed yeast and candida instead of helping it.

So what should you do instead?

In this video, we break down why yogurt may not be the best choice for gut health, and what works better.

videos.title: $21 vs. $68 Pizza! Adam Richman Eats NYC's Best Old School & New School Slices | Pro Moves
videos.summary_source_text:
$21 vs. $68 Pizza! Adam Richman Eats NYC's Best Old School & New School Slices | Pro Moves It's no secret that New York City runs on pizza. But in a town with thousands of options, which type of pizzeria reigns supreme: the old school mom-and-pop shops that have been doing it the same way for decades, or the new-school upstarts bringing chef-driven techniques to the humble NY slice? Adam Richman is a pizza obsessive, and he's on a mission to settle this debate once and for all. On this episode of Pro Moves, Adam travels to Krispy Pizza in Bensonhurst, Brooklyn to see how owner Freddy Palazzolo and his family have kept traditions alive for more than 50 years. Then, Adam heads to Manhattan to check out Ceres Pizza, where a couple of Eleven Madison Park alums are churning some of the most hyped (and expensive...) pies in the five boroughs.
